name: les-canetons-website
description: Dev tooling for the Les Canetons de Fribourg website.

scripts.websession:init: npm install && npm run php:install && node tools/ensure-dev-stack.mjs
scripts.test:php: node tools/ensure-dev-stack.mjs && node tools/composer.mjs exec phpunit
scripts.check: npm run lint:php && npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css && npm run format:check && npm run guard
scripts.fix: node tools/php-fix.mjs && eslint app/assets/js --fix && stylelint "app/assets/css/**/*.css" --fix && npm run format:write
